violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -No sanitizer buckets made/available (in kitchen) for use during inspection.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Single use portion cup left in bulk bacon bits as scoop.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Make table found at 40-47F. *Unit stated as tempermental and needing reset regularly. Unit was unplugged/reset while on-site.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Several items not date marked, specifically noted at bags and container of Macaroni and cheese, open bags of sauces and sausage gravy in walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Several tongs at clean storage bin at fryers had dried food debris on surfaces.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dried food debris at blade of commercial opener. (Corrected on-site.) -Food spill/splatter at interior of microwave.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris/reside at all kitchen refrigeration handles. -Grease debris/residue at wire shelf next to fryers. -Food debris/batter at handles and surfaces of raw chicken refrigerator. -Residue/splatter at surfaces of warmer. -Debris at refrigeration gaskets. -Food debris/moisture at interior bottom of make table. -Some debris at clean side drain board of dishwasher. -Dust/crumbs/debris/spills in cabinets below salad buffet and hot chicken buffet.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Exposed air duct (no vent cover) above prep surface in back/mop room area -Floors throughout are in poor condition, specifically raw cement in dry storage area and peeling laminate near mop sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/derbis at ceiling/HVAC in mop room. -Dust/debris at ceiling above dish pit and above cut table. -Heavy grease at floors and corners around fryers.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Dish washing employee handling dirty dishes then began putting away clean dishes without hand wash. dishwasher without washing hands.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Multiple items in salad bar cooler were not date marked (i.e. fruit, open cottage cheese, salad mix, etc.). -Bags of open sauce in upright stainless refrigerator at cookline are not date marked. -Multiple items in bottom of make line table are not date marked (i.e. tomatoes, deli meats, etc.)

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Dried food debris at blades of vegetable slicer.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue/debris at blade of can opener.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Heavy grease build up at wire shelf next to fryers. -Food debris/batter at handles and surfaces of raw chicken refrigerator. -Residue at handles and surfaces of warmer. -Residue at underside of handles at 2 door stainless refrigerator and make line. -Debris at refrigeration gaskets. -Debris at interior bottom of salad buffet refrigerator.

Service/janitor's sink. — --Service sink/curbed floor drain was not provided or used for disposal of waste water. -Faucet of hand sink at chicken station has continual leak that can only be stopped with valves below sink. -"Bell" of mop sink faucet appears bent/damaged.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Floors throughout are in poor condition, specifically raw cement in dry storage area and peeling laminate near mop sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at ceiling above dish pit and above cut table. -Heavy grease at floors and corners around fryers. -Deep clean of floors needed throughout kitchen.
